purpose: A cross-country, cross-language research and verification layer for emerging-market real estate opportunities.

positioning.one_line: A multilingual verifier agent that tests market claims, broker narratives, legal assumptions, permit stories, and pricing signals across jurisdictions before capital is committed.
why_it_matters: Emerging-market property research is fragmented across local-language sources, broker decks, municipal documents, legal notices, and market narratives.
Investors need a single decision-ready output that separates what is verified, what is contradicted, and what remains unclear.
This product turns the existing advisory promise into a visible, repeatable verification system.
not_a_chatbot: Outputs structured evidence and claim matrices rather than open-ended conversation.
Optimized for contradiction detection, confidence scoring, and diligence sequencing.

ideal_users: capital partners checking local broker claims
internal acquisitions teams running triage before legal diligence

core_outputs.description: Tests each submitted or detected claim.
Normalizes price, demand, liquidity, and comparables across local-language sources.
Flags permit path, zoning, utility, title, heritage, and site-risk issues where relevant.
Highlights ownership, tax, foreign-buyer, and SPV considerations at a high level.
Returns a go / no-go / watch verdict with confidence score and priority next actions.

workflow: collect primary and high-signal secondary evidence
detect contradictions across jurisdictions and languages
score confidence at claim level and memo level
generate diligence actions and escalation flags

integration_notes.platform_fit: Can be redeployed from the existing agentic Kraliki ecosystem without a new net-new app architecture.

page_copy.hero_subtitle: A multilingual research and verification agent for emerging-market real estate.
page_copy.hero_body: It tests broker claims, scans local-language sources, compares jurisdictions, flags contradictions, and produces one decision-ready memo with confidence levels and next-step diligence actions.
value_points: Checks local-language sources, not just English summaries
Separates verified facts from sales narratives
Normalizes countries into one comparable decision format
Flags contradictions before legal fees and site visits escalate

pricing_logic_suggestion.mandate: retained cross-border monitoring and deal support

source_registry.label: Perfect Mission prototype site
source_registry.use: Product-language alignment with existing site promises around AI monitoring, market intelligence, memos, and execution.

source_registry.label: Internal product concept based on user brief
source_registry.use: Feature description derived from the session brief.
